mapper.select: /* SQL ID : LessonCntsDAO.countLessonCntsStudyRecord 설 명 : 학습 콘텐츠 학습자 수 */ SELECT COUNT(B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD B ON A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.STD_ID IN ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ORG_ID = #{orgId} ) WHERE A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = #{lessonCntsId}

/* SQL ID : LessonCntsDAO.selectStdEnterStatusList 설 명 : 강의실 접속 현황 */ WITH M1 AS( SELECT 'prevMonth' as LABEL, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{searchTo} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), -1), 'YYYYMM') as YYYYMM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'nowMonth' as LABEL, #{searchTo} as YYYYMM FROM DUAL ) , M2 AS ( SELECT A.USER_ID , (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND USER_ID = A.USER_ID ) as STD_ID , SUBSTR(FRST_INQ_DTTM,1,8) as YYYYMMDD , COUNT(*) as STD_DAY_CNT , SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY SUBSTR(FRST_INQ_DTTM,1,8)) as ALL_STD_DAY_CNT FROM TB_LOG_LESSON_ACTN_HSTY A WHERE ACTV_HSTRY_CD = 'LECTURE_HOME' AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND SUBSTR(FRST_INQ_DTTM, 1, 6) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{searchTo} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), -1), 'YYYYMM') AND CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') >= #{searchTo} THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') ELSE #{searchTo} END GROUP BY USER_ID, SUBSTR(FRST_INQ_DTTM,1,8) ) , M3 AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) as STD_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' ) SELECT M1.LABEL , M1.YYYYMM , SUBSTR(M2.yyyymmdd,7,2) as DAYS , M2.YYYYMMDD , M2.STD_ID , M2.STD_DAY_CNT , ROUND(NVL(M2.ALL_STD_DAY_CNT/M3.STD_CNT,0),2) AS AVG_STD_DAY_CNT FROM M1 LEFT JOIN M2 ON M1.yyyymm = SUBSTR(M2.yyyymmdd,1,6) CROSS JOIN M3 WHERE 1=1 AND M2.USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND STD_ID = #{stdNo}) ORDER BY M1.YYYYMM, M2.STD_ID ,SUBSTR(M2.YYYYMMDD,7,2)
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : LessonCntsDAO.updateSeqLessonCntsOrder 설 명 : 순차 학습 정렬순서 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS A JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ, IF(A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = #{lessonCntsId}, 0, 1)) AS LCTR_CONTS_SEQ , A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS A WHERE A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = #{lessonTimeId} AND A.DELYN = 'N' ) B ON A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID SET A.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ = B.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : LessonCntsDAO.copyLessonCnts 설 명 : 학습 콘텐츠 복사 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS ( SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , SBJCT_ID , SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , LCTR_SCHDL_ID , LESSON_TYPE_CD , LCTR_CONTSNM , LCTR_CONTS_SEQ , LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD , PRG_RFLTYN , LCTR_SDTTM , LCTR_EDTTM , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_LOC_CD , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_NM , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_PATH , LESSON_CNTS_URL , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_LOC_CD_M , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_NM_M , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_PATH_M , LESSON_CNTS_URL_M , RCMD_ATNDLC_MNTS , PRGRT_TYCD , INQYN , OTSDPRD_ATNDLCYN , OTSDPRD_ATNDLC_DAY_CNT , OTSDPRD_ATNDLC_RCG_STSCD , ATNDLC_STS_CHKYN , ATNDLC_NWIN_USEYN , LESSON_DATA_FILE_YN , LESSON_DATA_FILE_NM , LESSON_DATA_FILE_PATH , LESSON_DATA_FILE_URL , ATNDLC_MNTS , SKPLC_DIV_CD , VDO_CLAS_SDTTM , VDO_CLAS_EDTTM , VDO_CLAS_RM_PSWD , VDO_CLAS_EXPLN , VDO_CLAS_RM_CNTN_ID , CONTS_TXT , DELYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM ) SELECT #{lessonCntsId} , #{crsCreCd} , #{lessonTimeId} , #{lessonScheduleId} , LESSON_TYPE_CD , LCTR_CONTSNM , LCTR_CONTS_SEQ , LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD , PRG_RFLTYN , LCTR_SDTTM , LCTR_EDTTM , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_LOC_CD , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_NM , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_PATH , LESSON_CNTS_URL , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_LOC_CD_M , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_NM_M , LESSON_CNTS_FILE_PATH_M , LESSON_CNTS_URL_M , RCMD_ATNDLC_MNTS , PRGRT_TYCD , INQYN , OTSDPRD_ATNDLCYN , OTSDPRD_ATNDLC_DAY_CNT , OTSDPRD_ATNDLC_RCG_STSCD , ATNDLC_STS_CHKYN , ATNDLC_NWIN_USEYN , LESSON_DATA_FILE_YN , LESSON_DATA_FILE_NM , LESSON_DATA_FILE_PATH , LESSON_DATA_FILE_URL , ATNDLC_MNTS , SKPLC_DIV_CD , VDO_CLAS_SDTTM , VDO_CLAS_EDTTM , VDO_CLAS_RM_PSWD , VDO_CLAS_EXPLN , VDO_CLAS_RM_CNTN_ID , CONTS_TXT , DELYN , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = #{copyLessonCntsId}
